description: Composition Pink crossover V-neck T-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has short sleeves and a green inner printed panel at front Fit Regular Wash Care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Bring out the trendy fashionista side of you with this pink T-shirt from urban yoga with an inspiring print. Team this tee with black shorts or skinny jeans and high heels. Model Statistics The product is a size 38 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
